Fields.Name: Horizontal Flight Braking Speed
Fields.Description: Braking when exceeding the maximum airborne horizontal speed, in m/s^2

Fields.Name: Vertical Flight Braking Speed
Fields.Description: Braking when exceeding the maximum airborne vertical speed, in m/s^2

Fields.Name: Actual Movement Reflection %
Fields.Description: The smaller this value, the greater the sense of weight.

Fields.Name: Damage Brake: Duration
Fields.Description: Time from damage brake start to end, in seconds.

Fields.Name: Damage Brake: Reset Delay
Fields.Description: Time from when knockback speed reaches 0 until the damage brake timer resets.

Fields.Name: Minimum Move Acceleration
Fields.Description: Minimum garaunteed acceleration during movement animation, in m/s^2

Fields.Name: Slow-Speed Brake Threshold
Fields.Description: Switches to slow-speed braking when the horizontal speed is below this value.

Fields.Name: Blow Dead Brake: Duration
Fields.Description: Time from blow dead brake start to end, in seconds.

Fields.Name: Blow Dead Brake: Reset Delay
Fields.Description: Time from when knockback speed reaches 0 until the blow dead brake timer resets.
